{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Advocate wizard
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Advocate wizard]] is a human woman with blond hair and a hooded mantle lined with fur.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12">''The Engineer'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|An [[Advocate wizard]] expanded a magic-banishing seal.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38">''The Engineer'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
